welcome: 👋 Hello! Welcome to Restinga Restaurant. Type *MENU* to see our dishes.
help:
📋 *Commands*
• *MENU* - View menu
• *NUMBER* - Add dish
• *QUANTITY* - E.g., '3 coke'
• *ORDER* - View cart
• *REMOVE X* - Remove dish
• *CONFIRM* - Checkout
cart_empty:
🛒 *Empty cart*

Type *MENU* to see our dishes.
delivery_type:
🚚 *Delivery type*

• *1* - Pickup
• *2* - Home delivery (100m radius)

Choose an option:
payment_method:
💳 *Payment method*

• *1* - Cash
• *2* - Bank transfer

Choose an option:
cash_bill:
💰 *Cash payment*

What bill will you pay with? (E.g., 50, 100, 200 MAD)
cash_no_change:
⚠️ *Sorry*
We don't have change for {bill} MAD. Can you pay with a smaller bill or card?
order_confirmed:
✅ *ORDER CONFIRMED!*

📋 *Order #: {numero}*
💰 Total: {total} MAD
💳 Method: {metodo}
⏱️ Time: {tiempo}

🙏 Thank you for your purchase!

Type *HELLO* for a new order.
address_request:
📍 *Delivery address*

Please write your full address:
delivery_zone_check:
📍 *Zone check*

Are you within a 100m radius of the restaurant (2-3 blocks)?

Answer *YES* or *NO*:
delivery_out_of_zone:
📦 *Out of zone*

We only deliver within a 100m radius. You can pick up locally.
